plan.statewide_assessment: Human-reviewed Idaho boundary proposal. Idaho has enabling authority in Title 50 Chapter 26 but no statewide BID registry was located, so coverage remains partial and municipal verification is required. Three active districts are ready for map review: Nampa uses an exact City GIS polygon; Boise and Idaho Falls use generalized street-line polygons digitized from current district maps. Caldwell and Lewiston are verified active but their official maps are parcel-level or too detailed for safe automatic conversion and remain manual work. Coeur d'Alene and Pocatello have current-operation evidence but still need authoritative boundary extraction. Sandpoint's current BID status remains unresolved. Meridian was only proposed as of 2026 and is not included.

districts.name: Downtown Boise Business Improvement District
districts.boundary_title: DBA and Associate Member Boundary Map
districts.notes: Active status, map, ordinance, and street-boundary narrative agree. Generalized polygon follows the published street description and requires visual review against the official map.

districts.name: Nampa Business Improvement District No. 2
districts.notes: Exact one-feature polygon returned by the City of Nampa GIS query; attributes identify Business Improvement District #2 and Ordinance 1946.

districts.name: Downtown Caldwell Business Improvement District
districts.notes: The City publishes current budgets and a detailed official parcel/tier map. It should be digitized parcel-by-parcel or obtained from the City GIS rather than represented by a broad perimeter.

districts.name: Idaho Falls Downtown Business Improvement District
districts.notes: The district publishes a boundary map and the 2025-2026 City management agreement confirms current operation. Generalized polygon follows labeled streets and requires visual review.

districts.name: Coeur d'Alene Downtown Business Improvement District
districts.notes: A City agreement confirms current BID operation and cites the establishing ordinance, but an authoritative current boundary map or machine-readable polygon was not located in this pass.

districts.name: Downtown Lewiston Business Improvement District
districts.notes: The City states the BID remains in force through December 31, 2026. The official assessment map is detailed and irregular, so it should be parcel-digitized or sourced from City GIS.

districts.name: Historic Downtown Pocatello Business Improvement District
districts.notes: Current management evidence exists, but the public visitor map is not clearly identified as the legal BID assessment boundary. Obtain the ordinance exhibit or City GIS geometry before publication.

districts.name: Sandpoint Business Improvement District
districts.notes: Current municipal evidence was insufficient to verify an active assessment district. Do not infer status from legacy links or a downtown association alone.

manual_next_steps: Review the Boise and Idaho Falls generalized polygons against the official maps before merging
Request parcel/GIS exports from Caldwell and Lewiston
Extract the legal boundary exhibits for Coeur d'Alene Ordinance 2293 and Pocatello Ordinance 2390
Confirm Sandpoint status directly with the City
Continue the municipal sweep because Idaho has no statewide registry

decisions.reason: Current official map and street narrative support a reviewable polygon.
Official City GIS provides a directly queryable WGS84 polygon.
Official boundary is parcel/tier based and should not be replaced with a misleading broad perimeter.

decisions.district: Idaho Falls Downtown Business Improvement District
decisions.reason: Current district map plus current City agreement support a reviewable polygon.

decisions.district: Coeur d'Alene Downtown Business Improvement District
decisions.reason: Active status verified; authoritative geometry still required.
Official boundary is detailed and irregular; parcel/GIS extraction is safer.

decisions.district: Historic Downtown Pocatello Business Improvement District
decisions.reason: Legal assessment boundary has not yet been distinguished from visitor/downtown maps.
Current active status is not verified.
